texto: Pure love’ means that it never increases or decreases. If it does not decrease when you curse him and it does not increase when you give him garlands of flowers
autor: it is ‘Pure Love’. ‘Pure love’ is considered Paramatma prem (Love of God). That is indeed true religion.
explicacao: Citação de it is ‘Pure Love’. ‘Pure love’ is considered Paramatma prem (Love of God). That is indeed true religion. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Pure love’ means that it never increases or decreases. If it does not decrease when you curse him…” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, means em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
